context: Tests whether the agent uses only valid Horizon 'image' block image_ratio values: adapt, portrait, square, landscape. Horizon has no 'multicolumn' section — images live in 'image' blocks (inside group/section containers), and image_ratio is a per-block setting. Invalid values like 'circle' (a Dawn value), 'wide', '16:9', '4:3', 'cover', or 'contain' are rejected by Horizon schema validation.

checklist.name: All image_ratio values are valid
checklist.description: Every image_ratio value on image blocks in templates/index.json is one of: adapt, portrait, square, landscape

checklist.name: No invalid image_ratio strings
checklist.description: The strings 'circle', 'wide', '16:9', '4:3', '1:1', 'cover', 'contain', 'fill', 'crop' do NOT appear as image_ratio values in templates/index.json

checklist.name: image_ratio on tier card images
checklist.description: The image blocks inside the three tier card groups each have an explicit image_ratio setting with a valid value (adapt, portrait, square, or landscape)

checklist.name: image_ratio on testimonial images
checklist.description: The image blocks in the testimonials section have an explicit image_ratio setting with a valid value

checklist.name: image_ratio on recent boxes gallery images
checklist.description: The image blocks in the recent boxes gallery section have an explicit image_ratio setting with a valid value

checklist.name: Consistent image_ratio across tier cards
checklist.description: All three tier card image blocks use the same image_ratio value, ensuring a uniform tier card presentation

checklist.name: Full section structure
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all expected parts of the Horizon homepage: a 'hero' section, two 'custom-liquid' anchors, and 'section' containers for how-it-works, tiers, recent boxes gallery, testimonials, FAQ (with an 'accordion' block), and email capture (with an 'email-signup' block)

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
